title: Pan-Seared Beet Pierogi with Fried Onions
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish with a twist, featuring crispy fried onions and a sweet beet filling.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced onions and cook until golden brown and crispy, about 5 minutes.
Add grated beets to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pierogi according to the package instructions.
Drain the pierogi and add them to the skillet with the beets and onions.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the pierogi hot, topped with additional crispy onions if desired.
Garnish with fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
